name: Sourdough Oatmeal Whole Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out sourdough starter.
2. Soften yeast in warm water.
3. Combine boiling water, oats, molasses, oil, and salt. Cool to lukewarm.
4. Stir in 2 cups flour. Beat well.
5. Add to sourdough starter along with softened yeast and eggs. Stir in enough remaining flour to make a soft dough.
6. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead 5–8 minutes or until smooth and elastic.
7. Shape dough into a ball and place in lightly greased bowl, turning once. Cover with a cloth and set in a warm place free from drafts; let rise 1 to 2 hours or until doubled in size.
8. Punch down dough and turn out onto a lightly floured surface. Divide dough in half.
9. Cover and let rest for 10 minutes.
10. Coat two well greased loaf pans with about 3 tablespoons oats per pan.
11. Shape dough into loaves and place in pans. Cover and let rise in warm place for 1½ hours or until doubled in size.
12. Brush loaves with mixture of egg white and water.
13. Sprinkle tops lightly with rolled oats.
14. Bake at 375°F for 40–50 minutes, or until done (I find mine are always done at 35 minutes; watch carefully). Makes 2 loaves.
